items.prompt: recognizes bounded early numerals reliably in varied formats
items.expected_evidence: identify named numerals in mixed sets
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner completes the direct task accurately.

items.prompt: matches spoken number names to written numerals
items.expected_evidence: say the number name for shown numerals and select a numeral for a spoken number
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains the concept coherently.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to symbol_set_confusion.
items.expected_evidence: write bounded early numerals with stable orientation and distinguishing features
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies the source of the error and states the correct reasoning.

items.prompt: succeeds across cards, charts, tracing, and independent writing tasks
items.expected_evidence: distinguish numerals from letters, shapes, or quantity pictures
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner succeeds in a less-familiar context.
